PRNG Bias Investigation Results
========================================

  Clustering Ratio: 3.077
  Unique x-coordinates: 13
  X-distribution: {3: 2, 11: 7, 5: 4, 1: 3, 6: 3, 7: 5, 0: 2, 2: 2, 12: 3, 9: 3, 10: 3, 4: 2, 8: 1}

  Clustering Ratio: 3.077
  Unique x-coordinates: 13
  X-distribution: {3: 3, 10: 3, 1: 5, 6: 3, 9: 2, 7: 2, 8: 3, 5: 2, 11: 3, 12: 3, 2: 4, 4: 5, 13: 2}

Conclusion: HYPOTHESIS DISPROVEN: Mathematical property, not PRNG bias
